---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or enhancement
title: "✨ feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / Motivation

<!-- What user-facing problem or unmet need does this address? Describe the
current pain, who feels it, and why solving it matters now. Avoid prescribing
the solution here. -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- The capability you want and roughly how it should behave. Sketch the
intended UX/API surface. If there are alternatives you considered, list them and
say why this one wins. -->

## Acceptance Criteria

<!-- Concrete, checkable outcomes that define "done". Write them as testable
statements, not vibes. These criteria are consumed directly by `/build`: each
becomes an Agent-Task success criterion the builder must verify before the task
is marked complete. Be precise — weak criteria produce weak builds. -->

- [ ]
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Out of Scope

<!-- Explicitly list what this feature will NOT do, so reviewers and the build
agents don't gold-plate. Anything here is a separate issue. -->

-
